creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
logo.html now longer lists SVG variants but the archive from FF[1] only has JPEG, PNG, EPS, PDF[1]. Converting PDF to SVG via Inkscape exhibits comment 4 issue. However, streambag's version renders fine with librsvg but exhibts comment 5 issue with Firefox.

Did the project give up on SVG logo?

[1] https://www.freebsdfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2016/05/FreeBSDLogoArchive.zip
